text.title: django-models Procedure
text.summary: Six steps from ERD to validated models spec.

step.name: extend-base
step.action: For each domain model: set extends ∈ {BaseModel, SoftDeletableModel, TenantAwareModel}.

step.name: declare-fields
step.action: For each field: name, type, choices_class if applicable. Mark is_pii at the model level.

step.name: declare-constraints
step.action: Add Meta.constraints entries: CheckConstraint for value ranges, UniqueConstraint for conditional uniqueness. Pin PostgreSQL when using partial conditions.

step.name: declare-indexes
step.action: For each field/combination used in filter()/order_by()/distinct() on production traffic: add db_index or a composite Meta.indexes entry. Justify in reason (≥ 10 chars).
step.decision-gate: Reject db_index=true with empty or short reason.

step.name: audit-on-delete
step.action: For each FK: choose on_delete explicitly with reason ≥ 10 chars. Default CASCADE on user/account refs is rejected.

step.name: wire-full-clean-and-validate
step.action: Set full_clean_in_service=true (this is a contract: every service that saves the model calls full_clean first). Emit spec; run scripts/validate-django-models.py.
